taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: Machine learning, Statistics, Experimentation, Causal inference, Python
skill_match_scores: Machine learning:1.0, Statistics:1.0, Experimentation:0.0, Causal inference:0.0, Python:1.0
must_have_quals: MS or PhD in Operations Research, Mathematics, Statistics, Economics, Computer Science, Engineering or a related field with 2+ years of experience working in delivery and/or logistics (or 8+ years of industry experience in data science), Strong ability in translating ambiguous business problems into well-defined technical objectives and providing concrete data science solutions, Expert in machine learning, statistics, and experimentation, Proficient in Python, SQL, and source control management tools
core_responsibilities: Own the end-to-end development and operation of deep learning-based ETA prediction systems—building features, training/testing models, running experiments, monitoring and explaining performance in production, Collaborate with our business, product, and engineering partners across the organization to vision and deliver data science solutions for practical business problems, Deeply understand our users, our products, and our data to identify opportunities for creating machine learning, optimization and causal inference solutions to deliver a better customer experience and make our business more efficient, Build data driven, robust and replicable data science models, Use experimentation and causal inference to measure the impact of our models on user engagement and business metrics
job_summary: Gopuff is a high-growth startup revolutionizing hyper-local instant e-commerce. As a Senior Data Scientist on the Delivery Technology Team, you will lead the development of data-driven models to optimize the delivery experience for consumers and delivery partners, directly impacting customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.
